title: RCAN Robot State Object
description: §20 Telemetry Field Registry — Robot State object. Top-level telemetry payload carried in a STATUS message. Aggregates robot-wide state and an optional array of Joint Telemetry objects.

ruri.description: Robot's canonical RURI. MUST match the RURI from the CONNECT message.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number. Receivers MAY use for gap detection. Resets on reconnect.

uptime_ms.description: Milliseconds since the robot process last started.

battery_pct.description: Battery state of charge as a percentage (0–100).

position.description: Robot's 2D world-frame position. Origin is implementation-defined (typically map or odometry frame).

heading_rad.description: Heading angle in radians (0 = forward, positive = counter-clockwise).

joints.description: Array of Joint Telemetry objects (see joint-telemetry.json). MAY be empty or omitted.

timestamp_us.description: Timestamp of this state snapshot in microseconds since Unix epoch.
